name: Irish Cream Mint Cookies
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C). Have baking sheets ready. Blend oats until like flour in a blender, then mix with flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt. Beat margarine, brown sugar, and sugar in a large bowl until fluffy. Beat in egg, liqueur, and vanilla extract. Gradually beat in the flour mixture on low speed. Stir in chocolate chips. Chill for 15 to 20 minutes if dough is very soft. Drop by heaping teaspoonfuls about 2 inches apart onto baking sheets. Bake for 10 to 12 minutes until cookies look dry on top and edges are lightly browned. Let cool on baking sheets for 2 minutes before removing to wire racks to cool completely. Makes 48 cookies.
